codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature intent: remote checks now run from discovery, linked keys bypass the visible remote step and proceed directly to done, unlinked keys show the explicit not-linked remote header, remote check output is structured in a 3-column DataTable, and long GPG armor remains contained in a scrollable KeyPreview.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared UI primitive docs are stale relative to this implemented behavior: KeyPreview height and remote/link action-row ownership no longer match what ui-primitives.md states.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/ui-primitives.md:36 documents `max-height: 6`, but commit e047 key_preview uses `max-height: 5` (client/cc_sentiment/tui/widgets/key_preview.py:13). .factory/library/ui-primitives.md:92 documents remote step actions as `Link my key` + `Skip`, while commit e047 renders remote actions as `Back` + `Next` (client/cc_sentiment/tui/screens/setup.py:476-477) and keeps `Link my key` on upload (setup.py:493).

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit e047 diff for remote-verify-elision-and-header. No blocking or non-blocking code defects found for this feature; behavior aligns with the feature description and expected outcomes. One shared-state documentation drift was noted in ui-primitives.md.
